meta.name: Thailand
meta.title: Thailand Tour Package from Malaysia | Dhesu Travel & Tours
meta.description: Phuket, Krabi, Bangkok, Chiang Mai. Thailand tour packages from Malaysia starting from RM688. Book with Dhesu, trusted since 1988.

hero.badge: So Close, So Good, So Surprising
hero.headline: Often the First Trip.
hero.body: Come back a second time and Thailand surprises you again. A third time and you realise you have barely scratched it. Beaches, a great world city, and cool mountain temples, all at once, and somehow it feels natural.

why.heading: One Country, Four Completely Different Holidays
why.subheading: The finest beaches in Asia, one of the world's great cities, and a cool cultural north. Thailand holds all of it simultaneously.

highlights.title: Phuket: The Famous Island
highlights.body: Big, well-connected and lively, with genuinely lovely beaches. Day trips reach Phi Phi's turquoise water and the karst formations of James Bond Island in Phang Nga Bay. The pastel Sino-Portuguese Old Town is worth half a day too.

highlights.title: Krabi: Cliffs and Emerald Water
highlights.body: Towering limestone karsts rise straight out of the sea. Railay Beach, reachable only by boat, is one of the most beautiful in the world. The Four Islands tour and world-class rock climbing make Krabi the one people love more quietly.

highlights.title: Bangkok: The City That Never Gets Old
highlights.body: The Emerald Buddha, Wat Pho's 46-metre Reclining Buddha and Wat Arun. Then Chatuchak's 15,000 stalls, Jodd Fairs, the riverside Asiatique, and street food that is world class at every price point.

highlights.title: Chiang Mai: The North That Surprises
highlights.body: A moated old city with over 300 temples, Doi Suthep on the mountain, hill-tribe treks and the famous Walking Streets. The responsible elephant sanctuaries in the hills are among the best experiences in Thailand right now.

zones.heading: Where to Go and Why
zones.subheading: Thailand splits neatly into city buzz, southern islands and the cool north. Most trips mix two of them.

areas.name: Bangkok
areas.description: Temples, mega-markets, the Chao Phraya River and the best street food on earth. Chaotic, magnificent and completely its own thing.

areas.name: Phuket
areas.description: Thailand's biggest island. Resorts, international infrastructure, Phi Phi day trips and a nightlife scene that runs until dawn.

areas.name: Krabi
areas.description: Dramatic limestone karsts, Railay Beach and the Four Islands tour. Quieter and more scenic than Phuket, and a climber's paradise.

areas.name: Chiang Mai
areas.description: Cool northern air, 300 temples, ethical elephant sanctuaries and night bazaars. The Thailand that surprises people most.

bestTime.heading: Best Time to Visit Thailand from Malaysia
bestTime.body: Thailand has three seasons. Bangkok is excellent year-round, but the coasts each have their own wet season, so it is worth checking which one you are heading to.

seasons.name: Cool Dry Season
seasons.description: The most popular and most comfortable window. Manageable temperatures, clear skies and the beaches at their best.

seasons.name: Hot Season
seasons.description: Very warm, particularly in Bangkok and the interior. The beaches are still good and the southern seas are generally calm.

seasons.name: Rainy Season
seasons.description: The Gulf and Andaman coasts have slightly different wet seasons. Lush, quieter and cheaper, with Bangkok still excellent throughout.

tripLength.heading: How Many Days Do You Actually Need?

options.label: Quick Getaway
options.description: Perfect for a Bangkok temples-and-markets weekend or a short Phuket or Krabi beach break.

options.label: Sweet Spot
options.description: Enough to settle into one destination properly, island-hop, or fit in Chiang Mai's temples and elephants.

options.label: Two Regions
options.description: Combine Bangkok with Chiang Mai, or Phuket with Krabi, and see two very different sides of Thailand.

packages.heading: Thailand Packages for Every Trip
packages.subheading: Packages include transfers, accommodation we have personally vetted, and guided tours where they add real value. The rest of the time is yours. International flights can be added on request.
packages.ctaNote: Honeymoon and romantic escapes available for all destinations.

whyBook.heading: Why Book Your Thailand Trip Through Dhesu
whyBook.body: Thailand is easy to plan, we know that. But after 35 years we have watched travellers come back either completely happy or slightly frustrated, because the resort was not what the photos suggested, the day-trip operator cancelled, or no one told them the Phi Phi ferry schedule changes in the wet season. We handle the details so you just show up and enjoy.
